Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

```yaml
# ARM Template to create an Azure Virtual Machine (VM) with OS & data disks, default settings for quick deployment; includes adding of Disk Encryption feature at Phase-II and Security features after validation 
parameters:
    location: '<location>' # Location where resources will be created. e.g., West Europe or North Central USA etc...  
    vmNamePrefix: 'vm-nameprefix' # Prefix for the VM name, can include alphanumeric characters and hyphen (-)  only! Do not change unless you know what are doing
